prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为5181→4414→3825→3468→3221，连续5年保持前移态势（位次数字逐年减小），近5年累计前移约1960名，年均前移约 390名；2025年基准位次约3221名，近2年（2024→2025）前移约247名，前移速度略有放缓但仍保持强劲；该校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021–2023年均为30人 ，2024–2025年增至32人，2026年进一步扩至33人，较2025年小幅扩招约3.1%。扩招使录取位次有后移压力，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京化工大学为2 11工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳步上升：2021年第62名→2024年第68名→2025年第63名→2026年第57名，排名提升反映学校综合实力持续增强，对考生吸引力有 所上升；2024年声誉评价为中性/混合（涉及师德师风调查，学校积极回应）；2026年声誉数据中未见该校显著负面事件。抖音热度总排名第7（高热），综合热 度约739万，在211高校中曝光度突出，反映报考关注度较高。历史投档异常记录中未见该校出现断档或暴跌信号，录取走势稳定；第五轮学科评估：化学工程与 技术A、化学A-、材料科学与工程A-，3个学科进入A类。化工、材料、化学等优势学科与该校工科试验班（先进材料、绿色化工、化工能源等）招生专业高度对应，对相关方向考 生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在海南招生专业以工科试验班大类为主（先进材料、高端装备、化工能源、生物医药等），相关学科大类（生化环材）社会热度偏 低（明显劝退），可能抑制部分考生报考意愿。计算机类、自动化类等热门专业招生人数较少（计算机科学与技术仅2人）。海南省考生总数：2021年52977→2025年67408→2026年 约78000人（普通高考），2026年较2025年增幅约15.7%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。；北京化工大学位于北京市（非本省高校），海南考生报考北京高校存在一定地域偏好，但该校在海南招生计划稳定在30人以上，未出现大幅波动。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历 年位次持续前移的强劲趋势、2026年海南省考生规模大幅增加（+15.7%）带来的竞争加剧、学校软科排名上升至第57名及抖音高热度的吸引力增强，同时考虑2026年招生计划小幅 扩招（+1人）及招生专业以社会热度偏低的工科试验班为主对报考意愿的抑制作用，多因素综合权衡后，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年3221名基础上继续小幅前移，预测最低 位次约3251名，区间2751–3751名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 自动化类（包含自动化、测控技术与仪器）
- 工科试验班（智能信息类，含电子信息工程、人工智能）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造，含机械设计制造及其自动化、过程装备与控制工程、机器人工程）
- 理科试验班（数学统计类/物理电科类/大数据与智能管理）
- 工科试验班（先进材料，含高分子材料与工程、材料科学与工程、功能材料）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（化工与能源，含化学工程与工艺、能源化学工程、氢能科学与工程）
- 理科试验班（绿色化学，含应用化学、能源化学、资源化学）
- 工科试验班（生物与医药，含生物工程、生物医学工程、制药工程）
- 国际经济与贸易（数智方向）
- 法学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（2751–3751名）内，建议以二档工科试验班（先进材料、高端装备）为主力填报，一档计算机科学与技术、自动化类可冲刺（参考2025年最低位次约2186–2429 名），三档化工能源、绿色化学、生物医药等作为保底。该校化工、材料学科实力突出（A/A-），对相关方向有明确兴趣的考生可重点考虑二档和三档中的王牌工科试验班。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province were 5181 → 4414 → 3825 → 3468 → 3221, maintaining a forward trend for 5 consecutive years (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). Over the past 5 years, the cumulative forward movement is about 1960 places, with an average annual forward movement of about 390 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 3221, and the forward movement over the past 2 years (2024→2025) is about 247 places, with a slight slowdown but still strong momentum. The university's enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province: 30 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 32 students in 2024–2025, and further expanded to 33 students in 2026, a slight expansion of about 3.1% compared to 2025. The expansion puts pressure on the admission ranking to move backward, but the impact is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities has steadily improved in recent years: 62nd in 2021 → 68th in 2024 → 63rd in 2025 → 57th in 2026. The rising ranking reflects the continuous enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength, increasing its attractiveness to candidates. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (involving a survey on teacher ethics and conduct, to which the university actively responded). No significant negative events were found in the 2026 reputation data. The university ranks 7th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of about 7.39 million, highlighting its exposure among 211 universities and reflecting high application attention. No signs of gaps or sharp drops were found in historical admission records, indicating stable admission trends. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, with 3 disciplines entering the A category. Advantageous disciplines such as chemical engineering, materials, and chemistry highly correspond to the university's engineering experimental classes (advanced materials, green chemical engineering, chemical energy, etc.) in Hainan, strongly attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Hainan are mainly engineering experimental classes (advanced materials, high-end equipment, chemical energy, biomedicine, etc.). Related major categories (biology, chemistry, environment, materials) have low social popularity (clearly discouraging), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Popular majors such as computer science and automation have small enrollment numbers (only 2 for computer science and technology). The total number of candidates in Hainan Province: 52,977 in 2021 → 67,408 in 2025 → about 78,000 in 2026 (regular college entrance exam), with an increase of about 15.7% in 2026 compared to 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing (not a local university in Hainan). Hainan candidates have some regional preference for applying to Beijing universities, but the university's enrollment plan in Hainan has been stable at over 30 students, without significant fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous forward movement in historical rankings, the intensified competition due to the significant increase in the number of candidates in Hainan Province in 2026 (+15.7%), the university's rising Shanghai Ranking to 57th and high Douyin popularity enhancing attractiveness, while also taking into account the slight expansion of the enrollment plan in 2026 (+1 student) and the suppression of application willingness due to the low social popularity of engineering experimental classes as the main majors, after weighing multiple factors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move slightly forward from the 2025 ranking of 3221. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3251, with a range of 2751–3751.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Automation (including Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Information, including Electronic Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing, including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Robot Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Statistics/Physics and Electronic Science/Big Data and Intelligent Management)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials, including Polymer Materials and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Functional Materials)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Engineering and Energy, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, Energy Chemical Engineering, Hydrogen Science and Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry, including Applied Chemistry, Energy Chemistry, Resource Chemistry)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Biology and Medicine, including Bioengineering, Biomedical Engineering, Pharmaceutical Engineering)
- International Economics and Trade (Digital Intelligence Direction)
- Law
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (2751–3751), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 engineering experimental classes (Advanced Materials, High-End Equipment) as the main choices. Tier 1 Computer Science and Technology and Automation can be used as reach options (referencing the 2025 minimum ranking of about 2186–2429). Tier 3 Chemical Energy, Green Chemistry, Biomedicine, etc., can serve as safety options. The university has outstanding strengths in chemical engineering and materials (A/A-), so candidates with a clear interest in related fields should consider the flagship engineering experimental classes in Tier 2 and Tier 3.
